ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-15-2016 Off Calendar

Notice Of Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Dec-08-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings reported by: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Nitoj P. Singh, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, TICKETFLY, INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION,
Order Granting Waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendants FILLMORE LIVE ENTERTAINMENT GROUP, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY,
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:
Damages: $338,537.50
Pre-Judgment Interest: $45,237.00
Attorney's Fees: $5,392.00
Costs: $565.95
Total Judgment in the amount of $439,732.45

Judgment signed in open court.
